title: [cross-impl] SelectChannel density>8 and EUI/seed concat mismatch Python/Rust/Zephyr
description: Reviewed commits e6e0285 (edhoc.rs hkdf_extract now matches Python exactly - good), 37ed82cc4 (node.py synchronized_hop_channel update to use protocol.hop_channel and eui64). However, protocol.py:547 hop_channel omits spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:121 IF Density > 8 THEN RETURN 0; tdma.py:15 uses 4-byte seed vs node.py precompute 8-byte BE EUI; Rust lichen_hash_32 matches FNV but no unified SelectChannel; C lichen_hash_32 in link_ctx.c:615 lacks full CCP-12 SelectChannel. Different behavior for same algorithm (ccp16-hop.json vectors, test/vectors/generate.py:1750). Vectors must match exactly across impls. P1 bug.
